allies.rationale_text: Deliberate-practice helps specialization convert narrow focus into genuine skill rather than mere identity claim.
Scaffolding helps specialization build mastery in structured layers instead of demanding expert performance all at once.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes specialization cling to one favored frame and ignore signals that a different model is needed.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Specialization conflicts with latticework-of-mental-models when depth in one domain prevents the cross-disciplinary integration that the latticework requires.
structured_tensions.source_quote: specialization conflicts with latticework-of-mental-models (latticework of mental models) when depth in one domain prevents the cross-disciplinary integration that the latticework requires.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Specialization conflicts with growth-mindset when specialist identity resistance to role change is labeled incompetence rather than recognized as a legitimate expertise boundary.
structured_tensions.source_quote: specialization conflicts with growth-mindset (growth mindset) when specialist identity resistance to role change is labeled incompetence rather than recognized as a legitimate expertise boundary.
